e1_q1.question: What is the difference between the average of Commercial and the average of Matchday?

steps.text: 1. Take the Commercial revenues across all seasons and compute their average, then take the Matchday revenues across all seasons and compute their average.
3. Subtract the Matchday average from the Commercial average to get a difference of 885.5 million euros.

steps.text: Compute the difference between those two values.
